title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF CABILI, MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF QUEZON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5324 / 53 OG No. 16, 5144 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1711, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF CABILI, MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF QUEZON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Cabili, Municipality of Panabo, Province of Davao, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Quezon.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
